description: rigby-evolution-package was instructed to package and upload in a single call. Auth failure mid-execution triggered a token refresh and retry, which caused the POST /api/evolutions to fire twice — creating a duplicate Root Audit submission in production.
correction: Package and upload should be separate steps. Do not instruct rigby-evolution-package to auto-upload. Run rigby-evolution-upload as a distinct follow-on step after packaging is confirmed.
systemic_fix: Never pass 'immediately upload after packaging' to rigby-evolution-package. Package first, confirm, then invoke rigby-evolution-upload separately. Auth retries in the upload flow can cause duplicate POSTs.
